records.public_reputation: Contract inquisitor who roots out quota fraud, counterfeit seals, and disappearing inventories.
records.current_agenda: Keep Guildheart Hub workable through the obligations of inquisitor while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.

records.public_reputation: Contract-clerk burglar who steals licenses, ward keys, and registry tokens more often than coin.
records.current_agenda: Keep Guildheart Hub workable through the obligations of spellthief while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.

records.public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as border assessor.
records.current_agenda: Keep The Union workable through the obligations of border assessor while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.

records.public_reputation: Smuggled ledgers instead of jewels and became the cautionary tale behind three generations of contract fraud law.
records.current_agenda: Keep Guildheart Hub workable through the obligations of rogue while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.

records.public_reputation: Confidence player who wins influence by making powerful people think the scheme was theirs.
records.current_agenda: Keep Guildheart Hub workable through the obligations of tricksters while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.

records.public_reputation: Warehouse thief who survives on arbitration delay, bonded confusion, and merchant arrogance.
records.current_agenda: Keep Guildheart Hub workable through the obligations of thieves while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.

roster_context.identity: Guild-backed successor order replacing Mal’s active trade-mediation role across the former Mal sphere.
